message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam interfaceBorderColor #9370DB
skinparam classStereotypeStyle none
skinparam interfaceStereotypeStyle none
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam interfaceFontColor #000000
skinparam classFontName "Arial"
skinparam interfaceFontName "Arial"
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam interfaceFontSize 12
skinparam classPadding 5
skinparam interfacePadding 5
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam interfaceMargin 10
skinparam classBorderThickness 1
skinparam interfaceBorderThickness 1
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontName "Arial"
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontName "Arial"
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 11
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontSize 11
skinparam classAttributePadding 3
skinparam interfaceAttributePadding 3
skinparam classAttributeMargin 5
skinparam interfaceAttributeMargin 5
skinparam classAttributeBorderThickness 0
skinparam interfaceAttributeBorderThickness 0
skinparam classAttributeBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam interfaceAttributeBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classAttributeBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam interfaceAttributeBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontName "Arial"
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontName "Arial"
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 11
skinparam interfaceAttributeFontSize 11
skinparam classAttributePadding 3
skinparam interfaceAttributePadding 3
skinparam classAttributeMargin 5
skinparam interfaceAttributeMargin 5
skinparam classAttributeBorderThickness 0
skinparam interfaceAttributeBorderThickness 0
skinparam classAttributeBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam interfaceAttributeBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classAttributeBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam interfaceAttributeBorderColor #CCCCCC

interface SessionRepository {
    + S createSession()
    + void save(S session)
    + S getSession(String id)
    + void delete(String id)
}

interface Session {
}

interface ExpiringSession {
}

interface FindByIndexNameSessionRepository {
    + Map<String, S> findByIndexNameAndIndexValue(String indexName, String indexValue)
}

class MapSessionRepository {
}

class JdbcOperationsSessionRepository {
}

class MongoOperationsSessionRepository {
}

class RedisSession {
}

class RedisOperationsSessionRepository {
}

SessionRepository <|-- Session
SessionRepository <|-- ExpiringSession
SessionRepository <|-- FindByIndexNameSessionRepository
SessionRepository <|.. MapSessionRepository
FindByIndexNameSessionRepository <|.. JdbcOperationsSessionRepository
FindByIndexNameSessionRepository <|.. MongoOperationsSessionRepository
FindByIndexNameSessionRepository <|.. RedisOperationsSessionRepository
ExpiringSession <|-- RedisSession
RedisSession --> RedisOperationsSessionRepository

note top of SessionRepository
    S extends Session
end note

note right of RedisOperationsSessionRepository
    RedisSession
end note

@enduml
